argv: Use tools. First state in one short sentence what you are doing. Then use Bash to compute 987654321987654321 * 123456789123456789. Then use Bash to run `sleep 3`. Then state one short progress sentence. Then use Bash to compute 111111111111111111 * 999999999999999937. Then use Bash to run `sleep 2`. End with exactly DONE on the final line.
notes: Excerpt captured from a real stream-formatted smoke run with --forward-unknown-json enabled
Keeps representative unhandled stream-event shapes so future implementations fail loudly until they normalize or forward them
